response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong software craftsmanship and architectural thinking, he fails to meet critical minimum requirements for this role. The position explicitly requires 8 years of C++ programming experience—his C++ background is limited to brief periods (2014–2015 at National Instruments, some robotics work at Altom). His expertise is primarily in full-stack web development (TypeScript, Node.js, React), not the large-scale infrastructure and distributed systems experience essential for leading a cloud compute platform.
strengths: Proven ability to establish and teach engineering best practices (TDD, refactoring dojos, design patterns) and mentor across diverse technical domains
Strong architectural and design thinking demonstrated through multiple open-source projects and complex system contributions
Demonstrated capability to rapidly learn and apply new technologies effectively across different domains and problem spaces
concerns: Severely under-qualified in C++ (minimal vs. 8-year requirement); primary expertise is TypeScript/Node.js and general application development
Limited production experience with large-scale infrastructure, distributed systems, or cloud-native compute architecture—background centers on web application development
No formal technical leadership experience in cloud or infrastructure domains; mentoring is workshop/educational rather than team-level platform leadership
